Describe the sequence of ingredients being added to the mixing bowl during the preparation phase.
canonical_answer: At 8s, a glass bowl containing chunks of yellow butter sits on the counter; at 12s, a hand tilts a small jar to pour white grains into the larger bowl; at 16s, hands pour beige rolled oats from a glass jar with a metal clasp lid into the mixture.
